title: Permutation and Rebalance Rules

allowed_rebalance_cases_later.condition: Only when a major global event dominates credible public-interest signals.
Only when India has several high-relevance public-interest developments.

allowed_rebalance_cases_later.possible_distribution: 6 India / 4 International with 2 Northeast-tagged India signals
allowed_rebalance_cases_later.condition: Only when multiple credible Northeast signals carry strategic, public-service or national relevance.

non_negotiable_rules: Total daily signal count remains 10 unless a later governed stage changes it.
Northeast Watch must be actively checked daily.
Rebalance must not be used to force low-credibility signals.
Public homepage space remains fixed; rebalance changes stored signal mix, not homepage layout size.
No automatic runtime rebalance is activated in AG45C.
